рҹ“· Import Exam Results from Image
Upload a photo of a marksheet вҖ” AI will extract names and scores, then match to existing students
Step 1 вҖ” Upload marksheet image
рҹ”‘ Anthropic API Key
Your key is used only locally in this browser and never stored or sent anywhere except directly to Anthropic. Get a key at console.anthropic.com
рҹ“·
Click to browse or drag & drop
Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF вҖ” clear photos work best
рҹӨ–
Extracting scores...
AI is reading the marksheet. This may take a few seconds.
Step 2 вҖ” Review extracted data & configure exam
Exam Configuration
Extracted Students вҖ” Match to Existing or Create New (Select grade first to enable matching)
# Name from Image Match to Student Action Scores (editable)

рҹ—‘ Delete All Learners by Grade
Permanently removes all students and their exam records from a selected grade
рҹ—‘ Delete Exam Records
Delete all submitted records for a specific exam вҖ” optionally filtered by grade
рҹ“Ҙ Import Teachers from Excel
Upload an Excel file with teacher details and subject assignments per grade
рҹ“Ӯ
Click to browse or drag & drop
Supports .xlsx, .xls, .csv
рҹ“Ӣ Template columns: Name, Phone, Class Teacher (optional), then one column per subject (MATHS, ENG, KIS, SCIE, AGRIC, SST, CRE, C/A, PTE) вҖ” each containing comma-separated class codes e.g. 4N,4S,5N
Preview вҖ” 0 teachers found
рҹ“Ҡ Class Mean Scores Entry
Enter or edit mean scores per subject for a grade вҖ” used in Subject Analysis
вһ• Add / Update Mean Scores
Subject Mean Scores (enter 0вҖ“100)
рҹ“Ӣ Saved Mean Scores
рҹ“Ҙ Import Students from Excel
Upload an .xlsx / .xls / .csv file and map the columns to student fields
Step 1 вҖ” Upload your file
рҹ“Ӯ
Click to browse or drag & drop
Supports .xlsx, .xls, .csv
рҹ’Ў Tip: Your Excel file should have a header row. Column names don't need to match exactly вҖ” you'll map them in the next step. Recommended columns: First Name, Surname, Gender, Grade, NEMIS, Assessment No, Parent, Phone
Step 2 вҖ” Map your columns
File: вҖ”
Rows: 0
Columns: 0
в„№ First Name and Surname are required (or a single Full Name column). Gender and Grade are also required. All other fields are optional.

рҹҺ“ Student Report Card (Scores + Rubrics)
Full report: numerical scores alongside rubric codes and points
рҹ’Ў Combined PDF: Select a Grade and Exam, then click Export ALL вҖ” each student gets their own page within one PDF file.
рҹ“қ Class Exam Results (Landscape A4)
Full class results with numerical scores вҖ” or rubric codes only
рҹҸҶ Combined Grade Results (All Streams Merged вҖ” Landscape A4)
Merge all streams of a grade (e.g. 4N + 4S + 4E + 4W) into one ranked list. Includes a Class column showing each student's stream. Students are ranked #1 вҶ’ #N across the entire grade.
рҹ’Ў All streams sharing the same subjects are merged. Each row shows the student's Class column. Final rank is computed across the whole grade.

рҹ“Ӣ Exam Supervision
Auto-generate and manage exam supervision rosters
вҡЎ Generate New Supervision List
Teachers are auto-assigned with rotation вҖ” no teacher supervises a class they teach
рҹ“Ң Fixed allocation: 4N, 6N, 6S вҶ’ 2 invigilators each  |  All other classes вҶ’ 1 invigilator
в„№ 4N, 6N, 6S always receive 2 invigilators each. All other classes receive 1 invigilator. No teacher supervises a class they teach. The following teachers are excluded from all supervision: MARTIN, GRACE, DICKENS, JECINTAH. Rotation is applied across all lists вҖ” teachers with the fewest prior assignments are picked first.
